name: @lesto/ai
description: PREVIEW (not part of the supported v1 surface) — app-builder AI primitives: a provider-agnostic, dependency-free model layer (generateText/streamText), a bounded tool/agent loop, a VectorStore retrieval seam, and an evals/guardrails hook. Anthropic Messages API over an INJECTED fetch transport so the pure core is testable without network. Experimental, coverage-gate-exempt (declares no test:cov). See ADR 0021.
